description: Use this API to create a new group that is identical to another group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariomodelgroup(sgroup, snewname)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group to be copied. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: snewname
parameters.description: Name of the new group. (input; no default allowed).
